creator: kaiwang27@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Thanks for pointing out the issues. Below is the new shar file.

--- .shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	.
#	./pkg-plist
#	./pkg-descr
#	./Makefile
#	./distinfo
#	./files
#	./files/patch-tads3-unix-osnetunix.cpp
#
echo c - .
mkdir -p . > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ./pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >./pkg-plist << 'ef3e7f63841ae908ba397c2bef1fbad6'

ef3e7f63841ae908ba397c2bef1fbad6
echo x - ./pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >./pkg-descr << '0e313719ff012ceaf97a028d51caa8f5'
XFrobTADS is a full version of TADS for Unix, Linux, and Mac OS X, by
XNikos Chantziaras. It includes everything you need for playing and
Xwriting TADS games, including a text-only TADS interpreter and the
Xcompilers for both TADS 2 and 3.
X
XWWW: http://www.tads.org/frobtads.htm
0e313719ff012ceaf97a028d51caa8f5
echo x - ./Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >./Makefile << '464ef7c6571951809b23e262cbe26e19'
X# Created by: Kai Wang <kaiwang27@gmail.com>
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	frobtads
XPORTVERSION=	1.2.2
XCATEGORIES=	games lang
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.tads.org/${PORTNAME}/ \
X		http://www.ifarchive.org/if-archive/programming/tads3/source/
X
XMAINTAINER=	kaiwang27@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	TADS interpreter and the compilers for both TADS 2 and 3
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	curl.6:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl \
X		execinfo.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libexecinfo
X
XMAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
X
XCONFLICTS=	tads-2.*
X
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=	automake autoconf
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	LIBS="-lcompat"
X
XCPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
XLDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xpre-configure:
X	(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SH} bootstrap)
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
464ef7c6571951809b23e262cbe26e19
echo x - ./distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >./distinfo << 'aec8793adfd5b7c3f00e62ae41a09ac2'
XSHA256 (frobtads-1.2.2.tar.gz) = f2802f6b8b2fb1e2a2c46cdec92b32e7135b6aceb3054a588eb9ebb9434a186e
XSIZE (frobtads-1.2.2.tar.gz) = 5213193
aec8793adfd5b7c3f00e62ae41a09ac2
echo c - ./files
mkdir -p ./files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ./files/patch-tads3-unix-osnetunix.cpp
sed 's/^X//' >./files/patch-tads3-unix-osnetunix.cpp << '6474355be53336f29f8596693752935d'
X--- tads3/unix/osnetunix.cpp.orig	2012-08-21 22:35:14.000000000 +0200
X+++ tads3/unix/osnetunix.cpp	2013-02-22 10:30:06.000000000 +0100
X@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
X #include <poll.h>
X #include <netinet/in.h>
X #include <arpa/inet.h>
X+#include <sys/socket.h>
X #include <net/if.h>
X #include <sys/ioctl.h>
X #include <sys/times.h>
6474355be53336f29f8596693752935d
exit
